headline: Memory Chip Prices Will Make or Break DRAM ETF Before Year-End 2026
summary: The Roundhill Memory ETF (CBOE:DRAM) is the first U.S.-listed pure-play memory-chip ETF, and it landed in the middle of one of the most violent upcycles the industry has ever seen. DRAM launched on April 2, 2026 with a 0.65% expense ratio, just as Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) was approaching a trillion-dollar market cap. Micron is up ...
